title: Poisoning - NHS
text:
may not need any treatment, but may still need to be monitored for several hours in case you become unwell.
How to prevent poisoning 
To prevent poisoning at home:
store medicines and chemicals out of reach of children, ideally in a locked cupboard read the instructions that come with your medicines carefully to make sure you take the correct dose put safety catches on low cupboards that contain harmful substances such as cleaning products to stop children getting hold of them keep liquid cleaning products and chemicals in their original containers to avoid them being mistaken for drinks get a carbon monoxide alarm for each room of your home that contains appliances that burn gas, oil, coal or wood wear equipment such as gloves, goggles or a mask to protect yourself when handling or using harmful chemicals 
Page last reviewed: 12 June 2025
Next review due: 12 June 2028
